title: Explain a small decision
subtitle: Give a choice and a reason.
overview: Give a choice and a reason.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I chose this route because it is faster.
我选择这条路线，因为它更快。
It is not the cheapest option, but it saves time.
它不是最便宜的选择，但省时间。
Why did you choose this route?
I chose it because it is faster and easier.
我选它，因为它更快也更容易。

items.en: I chose this route because it is faster.
items.zh: 我选择这条路线，因为它更快。

items.en: It is not the cheapest option, but it saves time.
items.zh: 它不是最便宜的选择，但省时间。

items.en: Why did you choose this route?
I chose it because it is faster and easier.
items.zh: 我选它，因为它更快也更容易。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Why did you choose this route?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I chose it because it is faster and easier.
lines.zh: 我选它，因为它更快也更容易。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: It is not the cheapest option, but it saves time.
lines.zh: 它不是最便宜的选择，但省时间。

items.en: I chose this route because it is faster.
items.zh: 我选择这条路线，因为它更快。

items.en: It is not the cheapest option, but it saves time.
items.zh: 它不是最便宜的选择，但省时间。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
